title: [Crash] System.ArgumentOutOfRangeException: Index was out of range. Must be non-negative and less than the size of the colle...
author: zgabi
body_snippet:
## Crash Report

### Exception
**Type:** `System.ArgumentOutOfRangeException`
**Message:** Index was out of range. Must be non-negative and less than the size of the collection. (Parameter 'index')

### Stack Trace

   at void System.Windows.Forms.ListView.OnRetrieveVirtualItem(RetrieveVirtualItemEventArgs e)
   at ListViewItem System.Windows.Forms.ListView+ListViewNativeItemCollection.GetItemByIndexI...
